response.justification: Bogdan meets the minimum requirement of 15 years of software engineering experience and possesses strong full-stack, cloud, and entrepreneurial skills. However, this is a Director-level Principal role specifically focused on AI Strategy. The candidate's background is primarily in general web, GIS, and backend development, with only very recent exposure to AI tooling. He lacks the deep, recognized AI/ML expertise, strategic enterprise advisory experience, and advanced AI-related degree preferred for this highly specialized leadership position.
strengths: Exceeds the minimum requirement of 15 years of software engineering experience.
Brings valuable entrepreneurial experience as the founder of an open-source platform, meeting a preferred qualification.
Strong engineering foundation with demonstrated experience in cloud infrastructure, full-stack development, and CI/CD.
concerns: Lacks the deep, recognized expertise in AI/ML and AI-powered product development required for the role.
No demonstrated experience operating at a Director-level capacity or advising strategic enterprise customers.
Missing the preferred advanced degree (Master's or PhD) in an AI-related field.
